error.guild_only: This command can only be used inside a server.
error.member_voice_required: Join a voice channel before using this command.
error.same_voice_required: You must be in the same voice channel as the bot to control playback.
error.bot_not_connected: I am not connected to a voice channel right now.
error.nothing_playing: There is nothing playing right now.
error.no_history: No playback history is stored for this server yet.
error.invalid_history_index: Invalid history index. Use a value between 1 and {0}.
error.spotify_credentials_missing: Spotify playback requires SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET in .env.
error.no_matches: No playable results were found for the given input.
error.invalid_language: Choose a valid language. Available values: TR or EN.
error.invalid_queue_page: Invalid queue page. Use a page between 1 and {0}.
state.auto_left: Left the voice channel because no listeners remained.
queue.title: Queue
queue.no_up_next_status: There are no other tracks in queue.
history.title: Recent Songs
player.title: Now Playing
language.title: Language Settings
language.name: English
success.title: Music Bot
error.title: Error
notify.auto_left_body: I disconnected automatically because there were no listeners left in the channel.
search.title: Choose a Track
search.instructions: Use the buttons below to choose the track you want to queue.
search.expired: This selection has expired and can no longer be used.
search.unauthorized: Only the user who ran the command can use this selection menu.
help.title: Commands
help.play: Play a song, video, URL, or search query.
help.skip: Skip the current track or a specified number of tracks.
help.stop: Clear the queue and stop playback.
help.nowplaying: Show the track that is currently playing.
help.leave: Disconnect the bot from the voice channel.
help.last: List the last 5 songs or replay the one you choose.
help.replaylast: Replay the most recently played song.
help.language: Change the bot language to Turkish or English.
help.help: Show all commands with their descriptions.
